𐔌 . ⋮ 𝐓𝐇𝐄 𝐏𝐋𝐎𝐓 .ᐟ ֹ ₊ ꒱

you weren't sure when it started. falling in love with your best friend, Carter.

yeah, the supposed jerky frat fuck boy that likes to play everyone and worship them body and soul before moving on like nothing happened the night before.

and you sure as hell don't remember when this thing between you started either. the making out in dark corners of parties. making out in your dorm room, empty classrooms, storage closets, locker rooms, when nobody was around. and more importantly, when you both were drunk enough to do it in front of everyone.

things would get handsy and heated enough just to feel something, but Carter would always push away just before you explore anything further.

and when you asked what you both were? the dreaded question. Carter would brush it off and say it's nothing. it's a normal thing best friends do. you could beg to differ.

tonight was no different than any.

drunk makeout sessions in a secluded corner away from the prying eyes of the raging party, his frat brothers decided to host. something about celebrating the football team's big win earlier that night. pushed you away before you could take it further.

It wasn't until after he walked away that a friend of his, Ayden, fellow frat bro in arms, asked about your relationship status, if you both were together.

now with you standing behind him and a curious frat brother wondering if you're together so he can bang you, Carter just might explode.
